description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and archive. In the build stage add a build_project job that runs `xcodebuild test -project GitLab-CI-for-iOS.xcodeproj -scheme GitLab-CI-for-iOS -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 6s,OS=9.2' | xcpretty -s`, uses the runner tags ios_9-2, xcode_7-2, and osx_10-11, and belongs to the build stage. In the archive stage add an archive_project job that runs `xcodebuild clean archive -archivePath build/Gitlab-CI-for-iOS -scheme GitLab-CI-for-iOS` followed by `xcodebuild -exportArchive -exportFormat ipa -archivePath "build/Gitlab-CI-for-iOS.xcarchive" -exportPath "build/GitLab-CI-for-iOS.ipa"`, stores the generated IPA at `build/GitLab-CI-for-iOS.ipa` as an artifact, uses the same runner tags, and is assigned to the archive stage.
